scenarios.description: Replaces a non-root child in head (parent != null && origSize == new size) and continues traversal on replacement
scenarios.precondition: Element root has one child; visitor.head replaces that child node with a new node of same parent child count
scenarios.expectedResult: Traversal visits head on original child, replacement keeps siblingIndex, then visits head and tail on replacement, then tail on root
pseudocode: @Override public void head(Node node, int depth) {
@Override public void tail(Node node, int depth) { record(node.nodeName() + ":tail:" + depth); }
// assert that replacement "q" was visited at depth 1 and tail on root at depth 0

scenarios.description: Removes a non-root child in head (parent != null && origSize != new size) and skips its tail
scenarios.precondition: Element root has one child; visitor.head removes that child node
scenarios.expectedResult: Traversal skips tail for removed child; only head on child and tail on root at depth 0
pseudocode: @Override public void head(Node node, int depth) { if (node == child) node.remove(); }
@Override public void tail(Node node, int depth) { record(node.nodeName() + ":tail:" + depth); }
// assert that head("span:0") was called, no tail for span, then tail("div:0")

scenarios.description: Deep nested tree triggers multiple ascents when no siblings (inner while: node.nextSibling null && depth>0)
scenarios.expectedResult: Visits head/tail at depths 0,1,2 and inner ascend calls tail at depth 2 then 1 before final tail at depth 0
pseudocode: @Override public void head(Node node, int depth) { record(node.nodeName() + ":head:" + depth); }
@Override public void tail(Node node, int depth) { record(node.nodeName() + ":tail:" + depth); }
// assert sequence: head:0, head:1, head:2, tail:2, tail:1, tail:0
